attributes.action: Freeze the assets of Iranian regime, their family members in the United Kingdom
attributes.additional_details:
To the House of Commons
The petition of residents of the United Kingdom,
Declares that there are concerns regarding Iranian regime affiliates, alleged involvement in human rights abuses, and the presence of related individuals and assets in the UK.
The petitioners therefore request that the Government identify, investigate, and, where appropriate under UK law, freeze assets linked to Iranian regime affiliates and their immediate family members.
attributes.background:
The petition of residents of the United Kingdom,
Declares that stronger measures are needed to address assets held in the UK by individuals and entities affiliated with the Iranian regime.

rejection.details:
You can find information about individuals and businesses currently sanctioned here: 
https://search-uk-sanctions-list.service.gov.uk/?searchValue=iran&regimeNames=Iran

More information about the Government's power to sanction:
https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/iran-sanctions-guidance/iran-sanctions-guidance#introduction
